description: "Use when working on the Core project, especially for repo-specific architecture, shared module responsibilities, or internal integration conventions."
name: "Core"

# Core Instructions

- 這是 `core` profile 的主 instruction 檔骨架。
- 後續請在這裡補上核心模組責任、整合邊界、命名慣例與開發注意事項。
- 如果某份規則對多個 profile 都成立，應回頭評估是否提升到 `shared/`。
